name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: Trump outraised us in July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Trump outraised us in July. And not just by a hair, by $25 million. |
---
I'll get right to it, Peter, Trump outraised us in July. And not just by a hair, by $25 million. Just look at this tweet from his communications director. | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
We're always honest with you, and today is no exception. This is a lot of money, and money we know will go directly into smear campaigns against Joe Biden in key battleground states.

So we need to fight back, and that starts by making our goal for this week higher, and it means reaching out and asking for help.

[Peter, can you make your first donation today? We aren't going to catch up to Trump's fundraising advantage without you chipping in whenever you can, I mean that. Chip in $5 to make sure what happened last month does not happen in August:](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

This is not the first time we've been outraised. Joe Biden was outraised throughout the primary, but as a candidate, and as a campaign, we are resilient.

We can't do it without you, though. Fundraising at this scale is a team effort, and we wouldn't send you these emails asking for money if they weren't absolutely critical to our success in November.

[So please, Peter, I'll ask again: Can you make that first donation so we can take this setback and come back stronger?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.06_B3_outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee968/1860529852/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee967/1860529852/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee965/1860529852/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee964/1860529852/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee963/1860529852/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee966/1860529852/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee962/1860529852/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee965/1860529852/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb34/1cd0ac28/160d7ecd6/357ee961/1860529852/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Dear Friend, My opponent spent the better part of a quarter century cultivating a culture of obstruction and dysfunction in Congress. At one point he [likened his political tactics to the insurgency of the Taliban](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18630558/234900542/822551765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTgxMGE4Mi1jYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4WFJXudRE959z90T7FDR9FgZrMw9AdaJMUda_JAw-s=&emci=6e9e71ef-24db-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=c5810a82-cbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10438639). Legislation requires communication and compromise; activities Pete Sessions spent a career in Congress destroying. And so the House, the Senate, and the administration have been unwilling to negotiate for months, and have failed to help the tens of millions of unemployed Americans and struggling small businesses still hurt by the ongoing economic impacts of the pandemic. The administration gets a lot of criticism for its handling of the pandemic. And rightly so - some serious mistakes have been made. But Congress could have and _should_ have intervened long ago by passing the legislation and appropriating the funds needed by veto-proof majorities to protect the lives and livelihoods of Americans. Veto-proof majorities require bi-partisanship - and that's not the House that Pete built. You deserve better. _**[Demand Better. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, My opponent spent the better part of a quarter century cultivating a culture of obstruction and dysfunction in Congress. At one point he . Legislation requires communication and compromise; activities Pete Sessions spent a career in Congress destroying. And so the House, the Senate, and the administration have been unwilling to negotiate for months, and have failed to help the tens of millions of unemployed Americans and struggling small businesses still hurt by the ongoing economic impacts of the pandemic. The administration gets a lot of criticism for its handling of the pandemic. And rightly so - some serious mistakes have been made. But Congress could have and should have intervened long ago by passing the legislation and appropriating the funds needed by veto-proof majorities to protect the lives and livelihoods of Americans. Veto-proof majorities require bi-partisanship - and that's not the House that Pete built. You deserve better. =.** If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS ---|--- = | = = | = = | = = | = Thank you, and stay safe! name: Mary Mancini
subject: all in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
We were so excited to see the diversity and talent of Thursday’s primary winners. Now that we have our candidates, it’s time to go all in! That is why I’m asking for a contribution today. From Digital to Field to Volunteer recruitment and training – we need to raise a minimum of $40,000 a month from now until election day.
Some fun facts about our incredible 2020 slate:
·47% of State House candidates are women
·24% of State House candidates are people of color
·Two State House candidates are LGTBQ+
·62% of State Senate candidates are women
·38% of State Senate candidates are Black
·Marquita Bradshaw is the first black woman in Tennessee history to win the nomination to the US Senate and the only black woman running for Senate in the entire country
The bottom line is that we have candidates that people are excited to vote for. We need to do everything we can to protect that vote and keep voters informed. We have an uphill battle ahead of us, and we can’t win it alone. Will you help us by donating to the TNDP right now? It’s time for Tennessee to shed some red! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Friend,

**We just aired our first campaign ad of the general election, and I wanted you to be the first to see it!**

[**We need to make sure we’re reaching as many people as possible with this ad. If you can, will you chip in a few dollars to help us keep it on air?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18635071/234974507/-1669862393?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=a6d5be7c-e4db-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQ1YmU3Yy1lNGRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpBs-K_KYDCGd75Yi1ewqWnag3jtPemD_XcbKUsGVKQ=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18635072/234974509/-1669862393?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=a6d5be7c-e4db-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQ1YmU3Yy1lNGRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpBs-K_KYDCGd75Yi1ewqWnag3jtPemD_XcbKUsGVKQ=)** | [Fund our ads »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18635073/234974510/-1669862393?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=a6d5be7c-e4db-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQ1YmU3Yy1lNGRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpBs-K_KYDCGd75Yi1ewqWnag3jtPemD_XcbKUsGVKQ=)
---

**Friend, I grew up in a bar.** My family owned a restaurant, and we were working class folks. Like so many, we faced challenges. When I wasn’t bussing tables, I umpired little league games and worked as a janitor to pay for college.

My upbringing shaped so much of my time as a public servant. The people I grew up and worked with simply wanted a fair shake. I see my family in the families of waiters, janitors, teachers, nurses, and others, and I see a system that has been stacked against them by the most powerful among us.

**I’m running for Congress because South Central Pennsylvanians deserve a level playing field, but we have a tough fight ahead.** Special interests have already poured money into our race, and just yesterday a Republican super PAC announced another $400,000 to prop up Scott Perry -- including airing TV ads of their own.

[**Friend****, I’m counting on grassroots supporters, not big special interests, to help us reach voters. clean_body: Friend, We just aired our first campaign ad of the general election, and I wanted you to be the first to see it! = Friend, We just aired our first campaign ad of the general election, and I wanted you to be the first to see it! = = | = Friend, I grew up in a bar. My family owned a restaurant, and we were working class folks. Like so many, we faced challenges. When I wasn’t bussing tables, I umpired little league games and worked as a janitor to pay for college. My upbringing shaped so much of my time as a public servant. The people I grew up and worked with simply wanted a fair shake. I see my family in the families of waiters, janitors, teachers, nurses, and others, and I see a system that has been stacked against them by the most powerful among us. I’m running for Congress because South Central Pennsylvanians deserve a level playing field, but we have a tough fight ahead. | | Today is the Minnesota primary election. Have you cast your ballot yet, friend? Local elections have a direct impact on our community. Today is your chance to make your voice heard and elect DFLers up and down the ballot who will go on to the general election this fall. If you are one of the record number of Minnesotans who voted by mail: thank you for doing your part. If you have not voted already, here are a few resources that may be useful for you as you make your voting plans: [**Find DFL-endorsed candidates in your area**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qQV6Bhqg4vKKVnx1Il3sfvNZ-7BYplZgKWpnnsQbkFc=/iEPwvFXKxWvpasqF7JnBEW7K64XiTNCuZqUfNuKwGqc=) [**Find your polling location**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qQV6Bhqg4vKKVnx1Il3sfvNZ-7BYplZgKWpnnsQbkFc=/XOUR5xxGidkWictOWldVpDhgKz3-XhZNwkJgUZDb9dQ=?fbclid=IwAR3fSotdBoACc2Gsy8VpHyRQlf4ODTvGv4364G7evPJZaR_HY-DY_IuW7vE) [**Track your absentee ballot**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qQV6Bhqg4vKKVnx1Il3sfvNZ-7BYplZgKWpnnsQbkFc=/B_qq7VpExBc0Qjhz9agT8fLnpF0oKV3PG84s-HvJWfI=) Together, we can build a better future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. Please wear a mask and don't forget to vote before polls close this evening. name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Information on voting in today's primary runoff election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e343/614305538/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend, Today is Georgia's primary runoff Election Day, and communities across Georgia are holding elections. [For instructions to check if there is an election in your community, click here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e340/614305538/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/vbm-resources/"). We want to make sure you have the information you need. **Still have your absentee ballot?** Absentee ballots must be received by your county Elections Office by 7:00 PM TODAY, Tuesday August 11 in order to count. If you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, DO NOT MAIL IT. Complete it and deliver it to your county Elections Office or a drop box right away. [Click here to find your county elections office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e341/614305538/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do") and [click here to find drop box locations](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e34e/614305538/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/voting-information-and-resources/find-my-countys-ballot-drop-boxes/"). **Requested your absentee ballot but haven 't received it?** Keep in mind that in-person voting is happening today, and you can vote in person today if you did not receive your ballot. [Click here to find your polling location on your "My Voter Page."](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e34f/614305538/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do") Then, [click here to fill out this form to tell us your story](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e34c/614305538/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://bit.ly/AugustRunoff"). **Voting in person today?** Polls are open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM. [Click here to find your polling location on your "My Voter Page."](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa45e/34a064cc/1be04557/702e34f/614305538/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do") Thank you, Fair Fight Action |

name: AmyKennedyForCongress.com
subject: $45 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
Folks: **The House GOP super PAC just booked _$45 million_ on a massive advertising blitz in competitive House races this fall.** Republicans in Washington know we have a real opportunity to flip this seat blue, and they are pulling out all the stops to try to defeat reformers like Amy. In a race this competitive, we need to hit every fundraising goal to make sure we can respond to any attack ads that come our way. name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Friend, voter suppression should be a crime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
They're making it harder for us to vote. |
---
Friend,

Voter suppression should be a crime.

**As we speak, Georgia's election authorities are taking steps to make it harder for all eligible citizens to vote.**

Here's the deal, friend: I am neck and neck in the polls with GOP Senator David Perdue, and this race is becoming the most competitive in the country.

**With a race this tight, voter suppression could be the difference between whether I win and go to Washington to fight for _you_ \-- or whether David Perdue gets another six years.**

My campaign is focused on expanding the right to vote and fighting voter suppression, but I need your help to do it.

Congressman John Lewis and I launched my Senate campaign together with a Voter Registration Rally. **And when I arrive in Washington, I will honor his memory by championing passage of a new Voting Rights Act so every citizen's sacred right to vote is protected.**

**[Today, can you contribute $20 to our Voter Protection Fund? With 12 weeks to go until Election Day, we're hard at work mobilizing and protecting voters so that every eligible Georgian can vote, and vote safely.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed7/3613636183/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1&amount=20")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed6/3613636183/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_10")
---
| [Express Donate: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed9/3613636183/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_20")
---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed8/3613636183/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_50")
---
| [Express Donate: $75](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eedb/3613636183/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_75")
---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eeda/3613636183/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eedd/3613636183/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1_ex_other")
---
Friend, nowhere is the fight against voter suppression more important than in my state of Georgia.

What happened during our June Primary -- with understaffed, overcrowded polling places with hours-long waits -- was _an affront to the principles of our Constitution_.

Governor Brian Kemp and Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger administered an election that disproportionately disenfranchised Black and working-class voters.

_And just last week, Raffensperger tried to convince DeKalb County not to send absentee ballot requests to all voters._

**We cannot permit cynical politicians to abuse their power and disenfranchise American citizens.**

They don't want us to be able to vote by mail. They want us to have to wait in long lines to exercise our right to vote. They want to discourage us. They want us to give up.

We won't give up. _We are fighting back._

**We're going to defy their voter suppression, win this election, and pass a new Voting Rights Act that will make voter suppression a federal crime.**

**[Please, chip in $20 to our Voter Protection Fund. Friend, with just 12 weeks to go, we can't afford to wait.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed7/3613636183/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1&amount=20")**
| [Chip in $20 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eed7/3613636183/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vpf1?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vpf1&amount=20")
---
The struggle continues.

With love,

Jon

However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eedc/3613636183/VEsHBg/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/less-emails-new") If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eedf/3613636183/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/content/unsubscribe")

Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to electing Jon Ossoff and helping Democrats win back the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27d0/5b2c1286/3eae1b24/25f1eee1/3613636183/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

name: Voter Outreach @ Team Sri
subject: taking our message to your mailbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

We already know that the DC interests trying to influence our election are pouring millions of dollars into trying to keep this seat red. They already plan to spend $6.4 million in television ads alone.

But we also know that we can beat them by reaching out to more voters in more ways. We’re planning a large initiative aimed at reaching out to new voters: We’re building a direct mail program to ensure they see Sri’s message and know what we’re up against.

This direct mail program will reach new audiences (directly in their mailboxes!) and spread our positive campaign message of fighting for the families of TX-22. It is a vital piece of our Path to Victory, and we’re excited to launch it.

But we need your help. Can you chip in to our new Mailer Fund to ensure we can build a lasting outreach program and meet as many voters as we can?

Chip in now ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_vots_b1_all&amount=25

This is an election year like no other, so we’re expanding the ways with which we reach out to voters. We’ve increased our online presence, made plans to take Sri’s message to the airwaves, and ensured that our strong network of volunteers can call and text voters about the issues at stake for them in this election.

We don’t plan on fighting fire with fire and courting shadowy corporate PACs -- instead, we’re going to run a fully grassroots race and elect Sri to ensure that our message of clean, fair elections without dark money influences is heard everywhere.

Which is why this direct mail program has never been more critical. We need to be able to reach people online, on TV, and in their mailboxes -- and we need to do that as soon as possible.

So, if you’re able to right now, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to our new Mailer Fund so we can continue reaching as many voters as we can?

Chip in now ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_vots_b1_all&amount=5

Thanks,
Team Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.11_vots_b1_all&amount=25
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a2659816-f3db-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/681f9a22-fadb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODFmOWEyMi1mYWRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DgchggVVk8QjHYumrChR-4O66vN4SxoWVTB75ZWA5o=&id=117373579 .

name: Mike Espy
subject: My personal health care story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638571/235039776/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)
Folks, **Mississippi faces a health care crisis.** Too many hardworking people are getting crushed by the rising cost of premiums, copays, and prescription drugs. Our rural hospitals are closing. Protections for people with pre-existing conditions are at risk. And new coronavirus cases and deaths continue to rise. _In light of all this, I wanted to share my personal health care story with you._ I was born with chronic asthma, and when I was about five or six years old, one day I had an asthma attack so bad I began to become comatose. The story goes that my father picked me up, threw me over his shoulder, and ran me to the hospital. Back in those days, there was no ambulance or EMT service in a Black neighborhood like mine. There was nobody you could call. We finally got to the hospital – but there was no oxygen. While nurses prayed by my bedside, my father ran to the “white-only” hospital a few blocks away. He begged for a canister of oxygen to save his dying son, and they gave it to him. Because of my father’s heroic actions and the rural hospitals, I’m here with you today. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638572/235039777/-687159261?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) That was 60 years ago. Mississippi has made a lot of progress in the past 60 years, yet our health care system is still in crisis. Health care is not equal. We have failed our rural hospitals and our rural communities because we can’t guarantee affordable and accessible health care. That’s why my top priority in the Senate is to finally expand Medicaid in states like Mississippi, where health insurance and access to rural health care can make the difference between life and death. **So, I’m asking if you can share your health care story.** I want to hear about a time when you struggled to access the care you or a loved one needs. The more we talk about these issues, the more pressure we’ll build around the dire need for more accessible, affordable health care. [**In a few sentences, please tell me your health care story by sharing it with us here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638573/235039778/-687159261?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) | | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638574/235039779/-687159261?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)
---
I am dedicated to expanding Medicaid in Mississippi. We need it. We should have had it a decade ago. And when I get to the U.S. Senate, I'm going to be the one to bring it here.
Thank you,
Mike
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638575/235039780/696843065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638576/235039781/344316872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638577/235039782/-1017408249?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18638578/235039783/1468987509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmIzZDA2MS1mYmRiLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BP9aME0IxzYe8hj5gVieBeeG8XDuOAHK5noUnhG8qg=&emci=ceb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=cfb3d061-fbdb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)

body:

Peter,

We've seen **multiple** polls over the last week that put MJ within single digits of Sen. Cornyn -- with one poll showing this race in a dead heat!

It's going to come down to the wire, and we already know that the candidate who can reach out to more undecided voters is going to win. **[With 34% of voters undecided right now, can we count on you to help our outreach efforts?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e40/7f51f7bc/40a5aca6/4ef78904/3464801520/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4OTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.1nd__1891__&amount=10")**

Every dollar matters right now, and we're counting on our grassroots team to ensure we can reach out to as many voters as possible, in all corners of Texas!

**This election is going to be the closest one that Sen. Cornyn has ever seen, and it 's on all of us to make sure that he doesn't see reelection come November 4th -- pitch in now!**

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: re: our historic announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're confident that making sure as many people as possible see our ads will be key to winning in November. |
---
Peter, did you see our note about the historic advertising investments our campaign is making?

It's the _largest general election ad buy a presidential candidate has ever made. Even bigger than what Trump and the RNC have planned._ But we have to be honest:

**This plan is really ambitious -- it allows us to reach voters in 15 key battleground states and turnout supporters across the country, but we don 't quite have the resources we need to make this plan a reality.**

Peter, we're able to plan on making such a huge investment -- even though it's a risk -- because our grassroots donors have never let us down yet. And after being outraised by Trump last month, we're counting on a huge surge of grassroots donations today, to make sure we have the funds we need to keep our ads on the air and run the rest of our critical campaign operations.

[**We can 't afford to fall behind today. So we're asking folks like you who haven't chipped in yet to contribute $5 or whatever you can afford right now. Can we count on you to make sure we can keep funding the organizing and outreach programs we need to win?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B1_adbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B1_adbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We all know that the fight to beat Donald Trump, and this battle for the soul of our nation, hasn't been an easy one. We can only win if we fight hard, and sometimes that means taking risks.

We're confident that making sure as many people as possible see our ads -- contrasting Joe's leadership with Donald Trump's failures -- will be key to winning in November. But we also have to hire organizers, empower volunteers, and keep growing every other part of our campaign, too.

[**That 's why making your very first donation to fuel our campaign today will make a real difference in our fight to elect Joe and defeat Trump. So Peter, will you chip in whatever amount makes sense for your budget right now?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B1_adbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B1_adbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Thanks for all you do,

Joe Biden HQ
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef76b/4169203075/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef76a/4169203075/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef769/4169203075/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef768/4169203075/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef767/4169203075/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef766/4169203075/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef765/4169203075/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef764/4169203075/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef763/4169203075/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef762/4169203075/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef765/4169203075/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef761/4169203075/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef764/4169203075/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb5c/1cd0ac28/1600ef3aa/357ef760/4169203075/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: FW: I'm giving away a VIRGINIA AR-15 on stage with Ted Nugent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Derek,
It's pretty hard to find something more offensive than Ted Nugent, but Amanda Chase has delivered again.
At a moment when heartbreaking gun violence is still far too common in our communities, a leading Republican gubernatorial candidate is giving away an AR-15 assault rifle to excite her base, just days after she, with her own assault rifle in hand- reportedly joined a heavily armed gathering that included white supremacists in Richmond.
It's an urgent reminder of the true level of extremism we are up against with Virginia Republicans and why it's so critical to elect Virginia Democrats up and down the ticket in 2020 and beyond.
I'm going to fight like hell to make sure we win and I need your help.
**[Can you contribute anything you can afford to my efforts to help Virginia Democrats in 2020? Every little bit helps.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miMlYzrDTXorh54W6kP4vaL3nR_U_XlSdIu73-yvo8S1QCtbG9q6Ws2yWbDm7QATtQJrlUnBcC3JfSPhRAkVZcJzR1zwAJJX-0OFmC8UAeXhBQOkkEV6q317oEU3jIJdNFJltIBKkvR7d31yL4PD9WfHO4fEeTgc4Sfj9ShIBILMPX3h95yL7NjKBvvI-paUEJGf6jt2DmQgQK6ZAS6tuqSbxILl-beasvb_awZIBS0O9fmgw9j8Yb0VxMZzawpq3Ghw30SpV7kEn6rtn1iIMv4iTaAGBjhNN6SuGQA-gCpb5V_TTqOqOORQ31zYYIi33rVXYuWJRyQmygQUHkchuljbuu2hq3hmzxBXzlLWhnu86JbHVoX1hM9nqi_brtB6tVy-mUd8fBUcUAqpM630sxIQ/348/ZN-NocTwQXmLk6jmt7BxgA/h0/-DakYIsdTNyFj2oEVjvCqVA3zMqs9xprbaZXyLe0TnI)** **

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Mayhem Continues, Protest Narrative Crumbles’
body:
The press has been playing defense for Portland anarchists for weeks, suggesting riots and arson against a federal courthouse were provoked by federal | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2664a24caf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Mayhem Continues, Protest Narrative Crumbles’**

“The press has been playing defense for Portland anarchists for weeks, suggesting riots and arson against a federal courthouse were provoked by federal agents protecting it,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“So much for that. Over the weekend Portland police were forced to declare two riots. On Friday police said ‘people defied orders to disperse and threw rocks, frozen or hard-boiled eggs and commercial-grade fireworks at officers,’ the Associated Press reports."

Last week, rioters attempted to set a Portland police precinct on fire and block its exits.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d88fe5faa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Ivanka Trump, along with top security officials and business leaders, “will unveil $122 million in new programs and partnerships for the administration’s Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative Tuesday afternoon,” Rich Edson reports. W-GDP is focused on eliminating both legal and regulatory barriers as well as the cultural norms that hold back women’s empowerment across the globe. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7385eee216&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Access to high-speed broadband internet is not simply nice to have, it is a necessity in the 21st century . . . The lack of access means some kids are doing their homework in parking lots of fast-food restaurants—or not at all. That’s why President Trump’s initiative to expand access to broadband is so important,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in [_The Oklahoman_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0934b853c7&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For over a century, telehealth services have languished in a policy quagmire. Even as technology revolutionized our communication systems, telehealth struggled under the weight of stringent regulations and expensive, proprietary software that made widespread adoption challenging for patients and health care providers.” That’s all changing under President Trump, Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy writes in [_Newsweek_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=248f062873&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=343881c229&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c49440c075&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ecb4c203a3)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Peter,
I needed to update you on a critical development in my campaign.
**I am being ruthlessly attacked from all angles.** Far Left elites and their Super PACS from across the country are funneling MILLIONS of dollars into my race. They have made Maine -- with our small population -- the MOST expensive Senate race in the country.
_**There is no question about it: I am the Far Left 's #1 target this fall.**_
They are trying to remove me from office and ensure that Maine's Senator is a guaranteed vote for Chuck Schumer's Far Left agenda. That is why I created the **Fight Back Fund.** From here on out, we can no longer accept being outraised and viciously attacked by Senator Schumer and my opponent.
Right now, I need as many donors as possible to contribute to my Fight Back Fund and help my campaign immediately respond to their ruthless attacks. [**Can I count on you to become a founding donor of my Fight Back Fund today?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzE1MDQS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MDIxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: VP Update (Shedd HQ)
subject: Air Force 2 is Landing NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Vice President Pence is landing in Arizona right now to support our police officers and accept an endorsement from the Arizona Police Association. I’m here to meet him, but I want to give him an update on how Arizona patriots are supporting our police officers. As you know, ex-cop Tom O’Halleran claims that he’ll support our police -- **but his actions show us a different story.** **O’Halleran stood with Pelosi, AOC, Ilhan Omar, and the other Democrat elites and voted to cut funding from our police officers and redirected that money to illegal immigrats!** Friend, This is completely unacceptable! We must take this threat seriously. Personally, I’m ready to end it. In Congress, I’ll support our law enforcement officers and stop any notion of defunding the police. **[Will you join me in backing the blue?>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a2310541eef24ed28331e8d964c24618&_e=1k22QhWo6djzIhe09gRZjSqYZlSBe9GFzN-gEYISKFFr6SYN97olDJIQ90gF9T7z5dS_OuLkbJBjDp4cOENG5facEBH8FDtWopo6VhEx1GDCI0Ig4X_sqzih8xI_J8_i-2Xlt_KPSDKhsFPVxiqHLQ9pQbi5xJhSXbGspDhmMHlG5jYdHDt-GQcNu4pbgKvh_k38T4KkgTABOUdJKM0Xl6CosZA0UbIopiJf0TLPs0lZow29NHCL_z8i955--3Z6Fb-cRnfAZDKsMOQqRJ4g9KujTt8ODVFGT5Qm3k115ZeaWxnAg2gE3UqtiRIY_f3lkO0EAISarSkbufuvcdz167CH--ztRlL00Yze7ZY2vxeAti1ty5G61-etuSn5PWgKvKq2YGsOvzuxkRmA5gDSVRjN5NMZmA3QOZcOI-mcx8Q%3D)** **When I meet Vice President Pence, I want to let him know that AZ-01 Patriots are fighting back now.** [**Back the Blue**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a2310541eef24ed28331e8d964c24618&_e=1k22QhWo6djzIhe09gRZjSqYZlSBe9GFzN-gEYISKFFr6SYN97olDJIQ90gF9T7z5dS_OuLkbJBjDp4cOENG5facEBH8FDtWopo6VhEx1GDCI0Ig4X_sqzih8xI_J8_i-2Xlt_KPSDKhsFPVxiqHLQ9pQbi5xJhSXbGspDhmMHlG5jYdHDt-GQcNu4pbgKvhMLiWlDTYxboXfabRt0vsT8cr-WgXLkzh_VS7-jY7iViPH_jGVgblC1UdfFERCxMKUzJK0QCGvKyQgXSQiHXmgMusqQ5NYmGwGzAQ0h9Zd6qwhH9_ecp_mtfPd53i0B_PUsypdoFqKJ-Vu9c4pV73ph82AHSK6sjw8kOHnxZ59rfRBAKOlv4WlhUahdZwxj00PA8Ur7wlbaB33oh97tOeO33Ti0JuLyJlKkJeZqv51Jc%3D) Let's send a strong message to Vice President Pence that Arizona supports our law enforcement officers! name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We have millions more calls to make
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
This fight is on and we need you in it.

We've made more than two million phone calls to Texas voters over the last
two months, and our work is paying off. NBC News just changed its rating
on Texas — long thought to be the most reliably Republican bet in any
Presidential election — to "toss-up."

However, the first day of early voting is only 63 days away and we have
millions more calls to make. Can you join me for an upcoming phone bank?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34397?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1001&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1005&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]Monday, August 17, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1006&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1008&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]Wednesday, August 19, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1009&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]Get more info or RSVP »

Imagine what it will feel like if every attempt made by Donald Trump to
steal this election is thwarted by a stunning Texas victory on November
3rd. If Joe Biden becomes the first Democratic nominee to win this state
and our 38 electoral college votes since 1976, the impact will be seismic,
reshaping the political landscape in America for the foreseeable future.
It will forever turn the page on Donald Trump and allow us to begin the
necessary next chapter for this country.

Imagine what it will feel like if we elect a Democratic majority to the
Texas State House for the first time in 20 years, knowing that we now have
a check against racial gerrymandering and voter suppression, and the
elected leadership to make progress on healthcare, climate change, and gun
violence. This new Democratic majority is only nine seats away — and we
won more votes than Ted Cruz in nine of the seats that we are targeting in
2020. We can do this, because we've done this before!

Texas is the most important battleground state in the country. What
happens here changes what is possible not only for Texas but for the
entire rest of the country. And this is the most competitive Texas has
been in my lifetime. Trump and his enablers get that and they are doing
everything they can — from voter suppression to dark money Super PACs — to
try to retain their purchase on power.

Now knowing all of that, imagine what it will feel like if we miss victory
in the presidential race and these critical State House races by a couple
thousand votes, a few hundred votes, or even just one vote.

None of us wants to feel like there was something more we could have done,
some extra effort left unexpended. That's why we're organizing phone banks
from now until Election Day, reaching EVERY VOTER in the state of Texas
over the next couple of months.

And we're not doing it with mailers, or TV ads, or Facebooks posts or
robocalls — we're connecting people with people, calling and texting each
Texas voter individually.

These calls produce actionable lists of committed Democratic voters that
can be turned out by Democratic candidates up and down the ballot ahead of
early voting and Election Day. It's how we're going to win.

But we can't do this without your help. These phone banks are led and
driven by volunteers just like you and me. The only way we reach these
voters is if you make the decision to join us.

Think about how you want to feel on election night, and then [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?source=ema20200811-100954&t=1010&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q ]join me
for an upcoming phone bank. I'll be right there with you calling the Texas
voters who will decide the most important election of our lifetime.

Looking forward to seeing you soon.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1011&akid=100954%2E444211%2EEdAl7q

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

Hey, did you hear the amazing news? My friend and fellow Howard University alumnus, Kamala Harris, is officially joining the Democratic ticket as our candidate for Vice President! I know Kamala will be a capable, courageous leader for all Americans. I look forward to voting for her and Joe Biden in just 84 days (and I can’t wait to watch the Vice Presidential debates). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18642266/235123484/-931496894?refcode=em-200811-kamala&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIxMDNiNy0xYWRjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8fc_XgTiZMXVDdQy6I1ObTuKAE5tqXDkwv0-toc2siU=) Kamala has shown time and time again that she is a champion for all Americans. My friend and fellow Howard University alumnus, Kamala Harris, is officially joining the Democratic ticket as our candidate for Vice President! | Hey, did you hear the amazing news? My friend and fellow Howard University alumnus, Kamala Harris, is officially joining the Democratic ticket as our candidate for Vice President! I know Kamala will be a capable, courageous leader for all Americans. I look forward to voting for her and Joe Biden in just 84 days (and I can’t wait to watch the Vice Presidential debates). = Kamala has shown time and time again that she is a champion for all Americans. She is tough, principled, and fearless. She understands the importance of doing good work to improve the lives of the American people — from accessible health care, to child care, to affordable housing. And I want you to know: I am forever grateful for Kamala’s help when I first ran for U.S. Senate in Mississippi in 2018. She came to Mississippi to help get out the vote and spend time with voters. This year, 2020, is our chance to flip the Senate, elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and make real change — and with your grassroots support, we can make it happen. So, will you please chip in $10, or whatever you can right now, to help send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll work with Kamala Harris and Joe Biden to move Mississippi and our country forward? body:
Please take this poll as soon as possible before Joe Biden makes his pick. Joe Biden will be picking his choice for Vice President any day now and we wanted to do a quick poll to see which liberal you think he will pick.

Peter,

Joe Biden will be picking his choice for Vice President any day now and we wanted to do a quick poll to see which liberal you think he will pick.

Because Joe Biden is so confused and can barely remember where he is, his pick for vice president is of enormous importance.

Please take this poll as soon as possible before Joe Biden makes his pick.

_****_
[Take the Poll ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

**1.[Kamala Harris](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**--Kamala is a failed Presidential candidate who supports Medicare for All and is best known for implying at a debate that her potential running mate Joe Biden is a racist. Kamala laughed at the idea that the Constitution would restrict some of her liberal policies.

**2. [Robert Francis "Beto" O'Rourke](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**--Robert is a failed Senate and Presidential candidate who rowed crew at Columbia University then changed his name to "Beto" to run for office in Texas. Robert is best known for fleeing the scene of his DUI car crash. He is also famous for dressing up in animal costumes, filming himself getting his teeth cleaned, and saying "hell yeah we're going to take your guns."

**3.[Karen Bass](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**--Karen is a Congresswoman from California who described the cult of Scientology as "a universal creed and one that speaks to all people everywhere." Karen is best known for praising Fidel Castro as "Comandante en Jefe" and for her many speeches at Communist forums.

**4.[Susan Rice](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**--Susan Rice was Barack Obama's Ambassador to the United Nations and National Security Advisor. Susan is best known for being behind every disastrous foreign policy decision of the Obama administration including the decision to go to war in Libya, sending millions of dollars to terrorists in Iran, and illegally spying on General Michael Flynn and the Trump Transition Team. Due to Susan's involvement in the Russia hoax, she may have legal problems that would impact her ability to campaign.

**5. [Gretchen Whitmer](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzIzNTES1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg3MzYxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**--Gretchen is the current Governor of Michigan who banned Michigan residents from buying garden seeds while her husband tried to use her position to get special privileges for their boat.

****

One week from today is our biggest Federal Elections Commission deadline so far in this campaign, marking the end of the Primary Election period and the start of the General Election.

Vern Buchanan’s campaign and the media are already poring over our campaign finances looking for any signs of weakness, which means we must continue to keep up our momentum. name: Corky Messner
subject: Make a direct impact to “flip” New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Our Day of Action is coming up fast on August 15th! Sign up now >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/bef1f1f31bdb182ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This is quick follow-up. I wrote you about this recently, and I know that Todd sent you a note too. _THANK YOU if you’ve signed up._

We’re now in the 90-day drive to Election Day 2020, and we’re organizing a Team Messner Day of Action for this Saturday, August 15th!

[**Want to get involved? Join our Grassroots Victory Team today!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/c6275a0a8bf19bdbc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

We’re going to be out knocking on doors, delivering literature and yard signs, and making phone calls, to share my message and get folks fired up to “flip” New Hampshire on November 3rd by defeating Jeanne Shaneen.

**These efforts are VITAL, and we want to get at least 200 of our top supporters involved!**

Even if you aren’t available to help this Saturday, please **[sign up to join our Grassroots Victory Team](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/8d09a14b00bc1003c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** today. Ryan Nichols, my campaign’s Field Director, will get in touch with you regarding other ways you can help as we approach the primary, and you’ll be on the list of grassroots activists we’ll reach out to first regarding future volunteer efforts and events.
Thank you for ALL your support, Peter.

Let’s fight and win to turn New Hampshire “RED” on Election Day!

\- Corky [Join our Grassroots Victory Team!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/477f32b0c86bc0dbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/dd30278c0881ae66c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13654cc4b0aa48d7/4a3030e63aac6086c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e42/7f51f7bc/40b830cf/4ef789ff/683277417/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.2nd__1886__&amount=10")**
**Ted Cruz has taken a _huge_ interest in trying to stop MJ, Peter.** He's already starred in ads on behalf of Sen. Cornyn, and he's said a number of times that if the Republicans don't win Texas, then all of the "progress" that they've made will be lost.

Polls are showing this race coming down to the wire and only single digits separating MJ and Sen. Cornyn. More and more of Sen. Cornyn's allies are going to start sending him bundles of money, and **[we're going to need your help.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e42/7f51f7bc/40b830cf/4ef789ff/683277417/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.2nd__1886__&amount=10")**

Look: this is anyone's race as long as we have the resources we need to reach the 34% of Texas voters who are UNDECIDED. **That 's why we're setting a rush one day goal of 34 donors from your community!**
[BE OUR 26th DONOR](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e42/7f51f7bc/40b830cf/4ef789ff/683277417/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.2nd__1886__&amount=10")

name: Team Joe
subject: We hope you'll chip in today, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're still counting on more grassroots supporters chipping in today to make sure we don't get outraised again. |
---
Peter,

As one of our strongest supporters, we wanted to make sure you understood why August is such an important month for this team, and [**why we hope you 'll chip in your first $5 today.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B2_FTN-outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B2_FTN-outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

**FIRST:** We outraised Trump and the Republicans in May and June. This put us in a strong financial position, and we were able to make historic advertising investments thanks to the incredible amount of grassroots donations we received in those months.

**BUT THEN:** Trump ramped up his in-person fundraisers and added digital ones, and we learned last week that Trump and the Republicans outraised us in July. And not by a little -- by $25 million. That means he can keep up his ads smearing Joe Biden in battleground states across the country.

**SO NOW:** We can't afford to be outraised again this month. And it's not just about keeping our ads on the air to counter Trump's -- we're also building a first-of-its-kind digital organizing program to persuade and turn out as many voters as possible, even in the midst of a national crisis.

So Peter, now that you understand what's at stake this month, can you give $5 right now? We're still counting on more grassroots supporters chipping in today to make sure we don't get outraised again.

[**Any amount you 're able to donate today will make a real difference to power this campaign. **](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B2_FTN-outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.11_B2_FTN-outraised_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you,

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef154/2421544350/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef153/2421544350/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef152/2421544350/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef151/2421544350/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef150/2421544350/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14f/2421544350/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14e/2421544350/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14d/2421544350/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14c/2421544350/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14b/2421544350/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14e/2421544350/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14a/2421544350/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef14d/2421544350/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb54/1cd0ac28/16021c4d4/357ef149/2421544350/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Darin LaHood
subject: “I have no plans to resign”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
all Madigan cares about is winning a 26th term, holding onto power, and keeping Springfield under his thumb for as long as he can [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=276d0daf1f7544d487ee7095c167d03d&_e=IWGliKzEHPLB05JGH4siSRgrYeKL4SckxXQL3np7CKZpTPZ1wTSPr5tYUs9HFAaw-_VUe5xTh1Ip7-AVnk4EdhdrUapsuyhpeuepMN_vQ7NA6fc0Xy4FkD27NkoCh6ZzRE88Xd7MfetcSJZRM3MpWFNpVXDGp4sCmfrdwmIRhKij0xM0FyquiH3sAXwfGWY04UzpCpr3sND0EmnUnGdsrgyg92DC2Uo0NfVn5-tn6voAGm1Wsorxd0F5exU_f1-d_BH3Eb37oBu0OEzCVwcPGiYPHb8bBPHI-1aM2GCZyMFXTq5Ww8fnPt08RCOJZoPGMCKRLO5gdCbVd82vSzxYuI9SYNOD2LzFziptleVl93JQDQSaKKebEIaedMontv4N2ATJHS3DBb7-IH412EOgm2m3_gBbeFUqN7CogWJqcOlcT7lkJLAIk9bzFZAnU-iqZRNUBgrmun-E7v5P2gCQv_SH2UyqFvhgCxQTsq6PjtA%3D) | |
---
Friend,

**Mike Madigan doesn’t care.**

_He doesn’t care that even members of his own party are calling for him to resign._

_He doesn’t care that his actions have cost taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars._

_He doesn’t care that he’s brought Illinois corruption to new lows we never thought were possible._

All he cares about is winning a 26th term, holding onto power, and keeping Springfield under his thumb for as long as he can.

**Friend, I can’t stress this enough:**

We can’t trust dishonest, corrupt politicians like Madigan and J.B. Pritzker to do the right thing even when everybody is watching. We must restore conservative leadership in Illinois, and our chance to do that is just a matter of weeks away.
[**CHIP IN TO END ILLINOIS CORRUPTION**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=276d0daf1f7544d487ee7095c167d03d&_e=IWGliKzEHPLB05JGH4siSRgrYeKL4SckxXQL3np7CKZpTPZ1wTSPr5tYUs9HFAaw-_VUe5xTh1Ip7-AVnk4EdhdrUapsuyhpeuepMN_vQ7NA6fc0Xy4FkD27NkoCh6ZzRE88Xd7MfetcSJZRM3MpWFNpVXDGp4sCmfrdwmIRhKij0xM0FyquiH3sAXwfGWY04UzpCpr3sND0EmnUnGdsrgyg92DC2Uo0NfVn5-tn6voAGm1Wsorxd0F5exU_f1-d_BH3Eb37oBu0OEzCVwcPGlCSw7nhBHoTdX-TtXGWkSjdxKsxRuMULMJRioutmywiH7Xkg8em1rVCv38x2RNWUX0Pi9uaP8IBc3GcZmMvNC1KrxkgkXYpiVloMecnbfzRTB5q05vzlvFeNfT_2nmUySv9yITjgKTuHSLcogJkAthBk4tessMYDcFrtC40Zt8vghpNes8QO_vZaMBpxyjv3vkAjcNMHHmrQS_Kgw9CBXE%3D)
Restoring conservative leadership doesn’t just mean getting rid of corruption.

_It means establishing term limits and ending the system of careerism in politics._

_It means being transparent about where political money comes from – and who it benefits._

_It means focusing on people – not political power!_

Friend, will you join me in the fight to end the endless cycle of bribery, corruption, and fraud we’ve come to expect from the Democrats who have taken over Illinois?
[**CHIP IN TO END ILLINOIS CORRUPTION**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=276d0daf1f7544d487ee7095c167d03d&_e=IWGliKzEHPLB05JGH4siSRgrYeKL4SckxXQL3np7CKZpTPZ1wTSPr5tYUs9HFAaw-_VUe5xTh1Ip7-AVnk4EdhdrUapsuyhpeuepMN_vQ7NA6fc0Xy4FkD27NkoCh6ZzRE88Xd7MfetcSJZRM3MpWFNpVXDGp4sCmfrdwmIRhKij0xM0FyquiH3sAXwfGWY04UzpCpr3sND0EmnUnGdsrgyg92DC2Uo0NfVn5-tn6voAGm1Wsorxd0F5exU_f1-d_BH3Eb37oBu0OEzCVwcPGr9-DQln6C394bIH_InQZbiVcYvuxnFwnREUto1VkNbo71tNJ_du4zlJKmweKB5-R8XepNdYUIlwPXDwOcA6YEzqGyIKi4XlwU8_bGD-EaLukGHBQJGNO8xNW7yUmx36NVHSLcOK9tkRgnSbDnm2yO2ObVKq3q5YN5rqoVuPLKY8oY6ZNaZ0L55q7hSlTSl01tvsVTUtBAMozNb4uDrqV3M%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

---

---

Ben Ray

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2fd/18e32a7f/4dfd0438/7b2107a5/136921149/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2fd/18e32a7f/4dfd0438/7b21065a/136921149/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

"" "" I can't wait to share your input with the Convention, Ben Ray "" "" "" "" Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families. Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources. As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? ""** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

We already tried, **and failed** , to jumpstart our economy by “hoping for the best.” So why is Trump using the same strategy with our schools and our children?

It was a gamble then, and it’s a gamble now.

Yesterday, Trump defended his school-reopening bet with a **bold faced** lie: **kids are effectively immune to this virus.** It’s wrong, it’s dangerous, and millions of Americans know better than to take that sort of rhetoric at face value.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Donald Trump is attacking vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Americans deserve to vote-by-mail.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8120%2E868730%2Em4ZBq5) Friend, While President Trump and other White House officials are exploring ways to sabotage vote-by-mail ahead of the November elections, Washington state had _yet another_ vote-by-mail success story last week. Voter turnout in the Washington state primary election last week exceeded expectations: More voters voted last week than in the August state primary back in 2016 _and_ the presidential primary earlier this year. **That's because vote-by-mail is safe, secure, and easy.[This year, and all years, every American voter should have the option to vote-by-mail: If you agree, add your name right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Vote-by-Mail-is-Under-Attack?utm_source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&utm_campaign=primaryturnout&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8120%2E868730%2Em4ZBq5)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Vote-by-Mail-is-Under-Attack?utm_source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&utm_campaign=primaryturnout&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8120%2E868730%2Em4ZBq5)
---
While Americans are voting in record numbers across the country, Donald Trump and the Republican National Committee have gone to court dozens of times as part of a $20 million effort to challenge voting rules.
Now, President Trump and his advisors are mulling over executive orders to force the postal service to stop mailing certain ballots and to prevent election officials from counting ballots after Election Day.
**We know that last week's Washington state primary was another success story for vote-by-mail, and Americans everywhere deserve that same experience.[If you agree, add your name right now to demand nationwide vote-by-mail this November.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Add-Your-Name-Vote-by-Mail-is-Under-Attack?utm_source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&source=ema_2020-08-11_primaryturnout&utm_campaign=primaryturnout&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8120%2E868730%2Em4ZBq5)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
