subject: About masks...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Let's be real -- we should've had a national mask mandate months ago.
Tell President Trump: The U.S. needs a national mask mandate | ADD YOUR NAME >>

Let's be real -- we should've had a national mask mandate months ago.

President Trump, however, decided it was a better idea to politicize masks, than mandate them. We can't expect to beat COVID-19 if our nation's top leaders don't put politics aside and prioritize the health and safety of everyday Americans.

Public health officials agree that masks are an effective and inexpensive way to slow the spread of COVID-19. We should be doing everything in our power to make sure Americans are wearing them as they go about their day-to-day lives.

Join the thousands of people who are calling on President Trump to pass a National Mask Mandate >>

Thanks for taking action,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/_4MdSE3qHlT5cHSyYYDGZmTFElxRrg2FOaaL_w8mQfY=/cYEi3zsu51WRJ4W-631ZHhLF1BKk0NmlUnf8r-K8UEs=.

Friend,

Wow.

Just when we thought the idea of Joe Biden being President of the United States couldn’t get any worse, he announces that Kamala Harris, a failed presidential candidate and a corrupt former California Attorney General, will be his running mate.

Next, she ends her pathetic run at President.
Then, 3 months after ending her own campaign, she reluctantly endorses Biden.
After that, Biden gets accused of sexual assault, so he vows to choose a woman as his VP.
And now, Sleepy Joe announces Phony Kamala as his running mate.

These two liberals are as far-left as they come. Between both of their terrible records, it’s obvious that this radical duo is PERFECT for each other but WRONG for America.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: LIVE at 5:30 p.m. ET: President Trump holds news conference
body:
President Trump will brief the Nation this evening on our country’s unprecedented, groundbreaking effort to deliver a safe and effective... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=491c566f72&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 11, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE at 5:30 p.m. ET: President Trump holds news conference**

🎬 [**WATCH LIVE at 5:30 p.m. ET: President Trump holds news conference**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ede675aba&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** will brief the Nation this evening on our country’s unprecedented, groundbreaking effort to deliver a safe and effective Coronavirus vaccine—as well as treatments and diagnostics—to the American people as quickly as possible.

**Operation Warp Speed,** as the nationwide effort is called, aims to produce and deliver 300 million doses of vaccine in total, with initial doses available by January.

**By cutting bureaucratic red tape** , the Trump Administration has already helped several promising vaccine candidates reach the final stages of clinical testing.

**At yesterday’s briefing,** President Trump explained that “countries in every continent are seeing increases in [Coronavirus] cases”—including some nations that have applied among the strictest, most punishing lockdowns.

**“You have nations** that are really tough on the lockdowns, and they’re getting hit very hard,” the President said. “That’s why my administration is pursuing a science-based approach that protects the most vulnerable, preserves hospital capacity, and focuses on the delivery and development of treatments, and—ultimately—the vaccine.”

🎬 [**Secretary Azar: Two of six vaccine candidates in final stage of trials!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d75b3d7e1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Ivanka Trump and DOJ announce $35 million to help human trafficking survivors**

**Ivanka Trump joined** Attorney General William Barr last week to announce over $35 million in Justice Department grants to help survivors of human trafficking. The funding will be spread across 73 organizations in 33 states to provide safe and stable housing for victims.

🎬 [**WATCH: Ivanka Trump meets with human trafficking survivors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a755b2b6f0&e=3ee4985eea)

**“The coronavirus pandemic** has made safe and supportive housing for survivors more important than ever,” Ms. Trump said.

**Shortly after taking office** , President Trump promised to bring the “full force and weight” of the government to fight the scourge of human trafficking. Two years ago, [**he signed a bipartisan law**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=372a743e54&e=3ee4985eea) to give both law enforcement and victims new tools to fight sex trafficking and address the growing problem of criminals finding victims online.

**Now, new DOJ funding** will provide anywhere from six to 24 months of transitional or short-term housing assistance to survivors. The grants will go toward helping to pay for rent, utilities, and other expenses related to housing. The money can also be used to help victims secure employment, which includes resources for training and counseling.

**At a roundtable** announcing the grants last week, Attorney General Barr and Ms. Trump heard stories from some of these survivors and committed to continuing the fight against trafficking. That effort began on day one of the Trump Administration, Ms. Trump said. “Since he’s been in office, the President has signed nine pieces of legislation addressing this issue into law.”

**“The Department of Justice** has fought aggressively to bring human traffickers to justice and to deliver critical aid to trafficking survivors,” Attorney General Barr said. “These new resources, announced today, expand on our efforts to offer those who have suffered the shelter and support they need to begin a new and better life.”

[**Photos: Ivanka Trump and AG Barr host roundtable with survivors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59a0d46542&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump hosts a call with America’s sheriffs** | August 11, 2020
---

name: Joe Biden
subject: My Running Mate Selection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
|
---
Folks --

You make a lot of important decisions as president. But the first one is who you select to be your Vice President. I've decided that Kamala Harris is the best person to help me take this fight to Donald Trump and Mike Pence and then to lead this nation starting in January 2021.

[I'd like to tell you why, but first I'm going to ask you to add your name and welcome Kamala to our team.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efec1/1074110412/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-welcome-to-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

These aren't normal times. For the first time in our history, we're facing three historic crises -- all at the same time. We're facing the worst pandemic in 100 years. The worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. The most powerful calls for racial justice in a generation. And we have a president who has both failed to lead on the virus -- costing lives and decimating our economy -- and fanned the flames of hate and division.

I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. Kamala is that person.

I need someone who understands the pain that so many people in our nation are suffering. Whether they've lost their job, their business, a loved one to this virus. This president says he "doesn't want to be distracted by it." He doesn't understand that taking care of the people of this nation -- all the people -- isn't a distraction -- it's the job. Kamala understands that.

I need someone who understands that we are in a battle for the soul of this nation. And that if we're going to get through these crises -- we need to come together and unite for a better America. Kamala gets that.

If I'm President, I'm committed to making things better -- not just in the short term, but sustainably, structurally, and permanently. We won't have time to delay. I need a partner who can help deliver on those promises, and quickly.

I was privileged to serve this nation for two terms as Vice President alongside President Obama, a man of extraordinary character who I believe will go down in history as one of our great presidents. So, I know a thing or two about being Vice President. More than anything, I know it can't be a political decision. It has to be a governing decision. If the people of this nation entrust me and Kamala with the office of President and Vice President for the next four years, we're going to inherit a nation in crisis, a nation divided, and a world in disarray. We won't have a minute to waste.

That's what led me to Kamala Harris.

As a United States Senator from California, Kamala represents the biggest state in the union. She's been one of the toughest and most effective Senators on two of the most important committees in the Senate -- Intelligence and Judiciary. Two committees that have directly dealt with some of the most important issues facing this nation at home and around the world.

She sits on the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, where she deals with the nation's most sensitive threats.

We've all watched her hold the Trump administration accountable for its corruption, stand up to a Justice Department that's run amok, and be a powerful voice against their extreme nominations.

She's been a leader on criminal justice and marriage equality. And she has focused like a laser on the racial disparities as a result of the coronavirus.

As California's Attorney General, she led one of the biggest legal departments in the nation -- where she was a powerful advocate for people in taking on the big banks and protecting women and kids from abuse. She's delivered billions in settlement money to consumers, taking on companies for fraud, pollution and abuse.

I first met Kamala through my son Beau. They were both Attorneys General at the same time. He had enormous respect for her and her work. I thought a lot about that as I made this decision. There is no one's opinion I valued more than Beau's and I'm proud to have Kamala standing with me on this campaign.

Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what's right -- is why I'm choosing her. There is no door Kamala won't knock on, no stone she'll leave unturned, if it means making life better -- _for the people_.

[So join me today in welcoming Kamala Harris to our team.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efec1/1074110412/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-welcome-to-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

She will wake up every day -- like I will -- thinking about how to make life better for people. How to rebuild our country back better. How to make it more just. How to win the next fight in the battle for the soul of this nation.

Because that's what the Presidency -- and the Vice Presidency -- is. It's a duty to care: for you, for all of us. This will be the fight of our administration, and there's no better partner that I could have asked for.

Thanks for everything,

-Joe

PS: We'll be holding a grassroots fundraiser tomorrow so she can get a chance to talk to some of the grassroots supporters who have powered this campaign. I'd love it if you could join us. [So add your name to give her a warm welcome and then pitch in to join us. ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efec1/1074110412/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-welcome-to-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | [DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=&amounts=,,,&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.11_B3_RM_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efebf/1074110412/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efebe/1074110412/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efebd/1074110412/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efebc/1074110412/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efebb/1074110412/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeba/1074110412/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb9/1074110412/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb8/1074110412/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb7/1074110412/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb6/1074110412/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb9/1074110412/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb5/1074110412/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb8/1074110412/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb50/1cd0ac28/1606e3c1b/357efeb4/1074110412/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Sean Hannity SIGNED this for YOU

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: California dreamin’: Hale, Pelosi & Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
If she wins, her dream will quickly become a nightmare for Hoosiers. Let’s send her a wake-up call. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/california-dreamin-hale-pelosi-harris?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f129f5a9ab&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Is Democrat Christina Hale **_California dreamin’_**?

Hale was first endorsed by San Francisco’s own Nancy Pelosi, and last week, California Senator and (_and now Democrat Vice Presidential nominee_) Kamala Harris said she was supporting Hale, too.

With all of these California liberals jumping in to support Hale, **it makes you wonder if Hale were a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, how would she vote – with Hoosiers, or with left coast socialists like Harris and Pelosi?**
* Would she side with Kamala Harris – the [first Democrat to announce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=761d9c1b4d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that she’d co-sponsor Bernie Sanders’ single-payer healthcare bill? Would she work to eliminate private health insurance and [institute Medicare for All like Kamala Harris](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbb5e41d9a&e=1acd9bb3d6)?
* Would Hale applaud efforts to defund our police, like [Kamala Harris has done in Los Angeles](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2770b6996e&e=1acd9bb3d6)?
* Or would she side with Nancy Pelosi whenever the vote is close and they need another Democrat to support blocking the progress President Trump and Vice President Pence are leading for America?

We all know the answer to the last question.
[**_Donate $5 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate $10 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate $25 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate $50 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate $100 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate $250 to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>

Donate what you can to to Send California Liberals a Wake-Up Call >>_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=02f99bbe86&e=1acd9bb3d6)
This November, the choice couldn’t be clearer when it comes selecting Indiana’s voice in Congress from the 5th District.**We must keep this seat in Republican hands, and we do that by electing Victoria Spartz. She’s a businesswoman, a community leader, and she’s got a track record at the Statehouse of fighting to limit regulations, reform health care, and improve our schools.**

California and the coastal elites already have enough influence in Washington – let’s not let them gain a congressional district in Indiana, too. They’re endorsing here, and they’re spending their out-of-state campaign dollars here. **Would you chip in a today to help us protect Indiana’s voice from California’s influence and money?**

Is Hale California dreamin’? If she wins, her dream will quickly become a nightmare for Hoosiers.

Let’s send her a wake-up call.

-Your Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Send California Liberals Pelosi & Harris a Wake-Up Call >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=637ca97d1a&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Send California Liberals Pelosi & Harris a Wake-Up Call >>")

| Hi , By fully investing in our military growth and modernization, we’re restoring deterrence so no country wants to challenge us. I don’t want a fair fight out there, _I want to be superior_ — and this year's defense bill does that. **This legislation also includes a long overdue PAY RAISE for our 2 million fighting men and women!** But House Democrats are trying to hold up this legislation by including a poison pill that would **_require us to_****cancel **bases named after Confederate officers to be renamed. [**Help me stand up to the liberals who are playing games with our national security by donating $35 to our campaign right now.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg1Njg4MDk1NzEzMDA2NjMwJmM9aTdhMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODYwNDM2NjgmZD13MW81aDB6.Dy34s1Vi2jtqaEw2ihN75hHQjXQy8IcQ1iYLJ2FL9DE)

| This defense bill will enable us to effectively counter Chinese aggression and protect American interests in the Pacific.It will put us on a strong military footing that no one will dare to test. Now is not the time to put our national defense at risk by attempting to include a divisive political issue in this legislation. If Democrats want to rename Confederate bases, they should propose a separate bill to do so. **I've already told President Trump I won't let such a measure be included in this critical legislation. Our military funding is not a political football!** [**I need patriotic Americans like you, who support our troops, and stand for our flag, to band with me today. Join our campaign with a quick $70 donation right now.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg1Njg4MDk1NzEzMDA2NjMwJmM9aTdhMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODYwNDM3MDQmZD1wN3k4ejdm.jHHup5YNV3l_BJV8qqkxwRcxaL8HPu__GONIhtSfixM) It's up to you to show Democrats where the American public really stands on this critical issue. We have to defend our military from the liberals who want to use defense funding as a bargaining chip. I'm depending on the financial support of grassroots conservatives like you to help me win this fight. I can't do this alone. I trust I can count on your support today.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Biden-Harris: Let's get it done!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Derek,
The ticket is set and let me say, Joe Biden knocked it out of the park! Kamala Harris will be ready on day one. She's a strong partner who, like Joe, is committed to rebuilding an inclusive economy that works for the American people. Biden-Harris is the winning ticket! Peter - embracing his long-held belief of country over party, Gov. Kasich has accepted an invitation to speak at the Democratic National Convention in support of Joe Biden on Monday.

The governor believes that the time has come for Americans, whatever their party loyalties or sense of political independence, to choose the path of unity after four exhausting and dangerous years of division and chaos.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Gray hairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This had me doing a double take.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e4c/7f51f7bc/40bc47bb/4ef78ff7/2676488323/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e4c/7f51f7bc/40bc47bb/4ef78ff6/2676488323/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.3nd__1893__&amount=10")
---
Look, Peter,

I don't doubt that running a campaign is giving me some gray hairs, but this doctored image that national Republicans put out certainly made me do a double take.

I showed it to my husband just in case, and he's assured me that I haven't aged quite this much yet. Nope, they're just resorting to silly political tactics. That's because Sen. Cornyn and his allies know he can't defeat me on the issues. After 18 years of standing with special interests over Texans, there isn't much he can say about what he's done, so his team had to resort to doctoring my photo.

**[C'mon, y'all. Can you help me raise $15,000 right now to show them that their predictable political tricks are going to backfire?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e4c/7f51f7bc/40bc47bb/4ef78ff6/2676488323/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200811.3nd__1893__&amount=10")**

Listen, this one's pretty funny, but they're not going to stop at photos on the internet. Sen. Cornyn and his DC allies are desperate to keep this Senate seat. And with the most recent poll showing us just _one point behind_ , they're going to spend millions attacking me, distorting who I am and what I stand for.

We've got to be ready to fight back. Let's beat Sen. Cornyn and their deceptive campaigning by telling Texans the truth -- that Sen. Cornyn has been in the Senate for 18 years and has spent all of that time fighting on behalf of special interests rather than everyday Texans. **Pitch in and help me win in November.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
My friend Kamala Harris is a tried-and-tested leader, and I am determined to do everything I can to elect her and Joe Biden this November.
I've worked closely with Kamala in the Senate, where I've seen firsthand her generosity of spirit and her ability to listen to the concerns of all Americans -- and then go to bat and make a difference for them.
**This is a HUGE moment. We 've got to throw everything we have behind Kamala and Joe.** [**I 'm hoping we can raise $15,000 TONIGHT to help them defeat Donald Trump, and I'm counting on your help to do it. I've worked closely with Kamala in the Senate, where I've seen firsthand her generosity of spirit and her ability to listen to the concerns of all Americans -- and then go to bat and make a difference for them. This is a HUGE moment. We 've got to throw everything we have behind Kamala and Joe.
